title: Efficient Acquisition of Short Tandem Repeats in Single-Cell Whole-Genome-Amplified DNA
author: Tao, Marx, et al.

steps.title: Duplex MIP preparation
steps.instruction: Prepare the duplex molecular inversion probes for a 12K panel of selected human STRs, OM6, to enrich these targets from the single cell WGA DNA in the following steps.1.KOD Hot Start Real Time Custom PCR Mix 5У (KOD 5У Custom Mix)a.Prepare SYBR 100У by mixing 10Т ЮМL from stock SYBR green I (Lonza, 10,000У) and 990Т ЮМL Dimethyl Sulfoxide (DMSO) (Sigma).b.Prepare 2Т mL KOD 5У Custom Mix according to the table below.ReagentsStock conc.Final conc.KOD 5У custom mix (ЮМl)ddH2O0.27KOD Buffer 10У (Merck)10У5У2.5MgSO4 25Т mM (Merck)25Т mM7.5Т mM1.5dNTP 25Т mM each (Bioline)25Т mM7.5Т mM0.2KOD Enzyme 1Т U/ЮМL (Merck)1Т U/ЮМL0.1Т U/ЮМL0.5SYBR 100У (Lonza)100У1У0.025Total Volume52.PreAmp PCR (8 reactions)a.Dilute the synthesized oligo pool (Custom Array, Inc.) to 1Т ng/ЮМL to prepare PCR template.b.Amplification primers designed to bind universal adapters are used for PreAmp PCR in LightCycler 480 (LC480, Roche) as shown below:OM4_Mly_F: GTCTATGAGTGTGGAGTCGTTGCOM4_Mly_R: CTAGCTTCCTGATGAGTCCGATGNote: SYBR in KOD 5У Custom Mix can be used to track the amplification for real time PCR.PreAmp PCR Mix:ReagentsStock conc.Final conc.1У PreAmp PCR mix (ЮМl)Template1Т ng/ЮМL0.2Т ng/ЮМL1.8OM4_Mly_F primer10 pmol/ЮМL0.3 pmol/ЮМL1.35OM4_Mly_R primer10 pmol/ЮМL0.3 pmol/ЮМL1.35KOD 5У Custom Mix5У1У9ddH2O31.5Total Volume45PreAmp PCR program:PCR cycling conditionsStepsTemperatureTimeCyclesInitial Denaturation95ТАC120 s1Denaturation95ТАC20 s18 cyclesAnnealing60ТАC10 sExtension70ТАC5 sFinal extension70ТАC50 s1Hold4ТАCForeverc.Purify PreAmp PCR product by MinElute PCR purification kit (Qiagen).d.Measure concentration by Qubit dsDNA HS Assay Kit (Life Technologies).3.Production PCR (48 reactions). Troubleshooting 3a.Dilute purified PreAmp PCR product to 1Т ng/ЮМL for template.b.96 well plate production PCR is performed according to the setup below. Amplification is tracked by SYBR present in the KOD 5У Custom Mix.ReagentsStock conc.Final conc.1У production PCR (ЮМl)Template1Т ng/ЮМL0.2Т ng/ЮМL1.8OM4_Mly_F primer10 pmol/ЮМL0.3 pmol/ЮМL1.35OM4_Mly_R primer10 pmol/ЮМL0.3 pmol/ЮМL1.35KOD 5У Custom Mix5У1У9ddH2O31.5Total Volume45Production PCR programPCR cycling conditionsStepsTemperatureTimeCyclesInitial Denaturation95ТАC120 s1Denaturation95ТАC20 s12 cyclesAnnealing60ТАC10 sExtension70ТАC5 sFinal extension70ТАC50 s1Hold4ТАCForeverc.PCR product are pooled and purified by MinElute columns (Qiagen).d.Elute with 45Т ЮМL ddH2O per column.e.Pool all purified products.f.Measure the DNA concentration of the final pool by loading 1Т ЮМL of the pool onto a NanoDrop spectrophotometer (Thermo Scientific).g.Dilute the pool to тМ30Т ng/ЮМL based on measured concentration.h.Retain 20Т ЮМL of sample to evaluate size distribution in Step 6. Carry the rest forward in Step 4.4.Digest the diluted DNA. Troubleshooting 4a.Combine diluted DNA with MlyI following the table belowReagentsStock conc.Final conc.1У with MlyI mix (ЮМl)Diluted DNA (30Т ng / uL)30Т ng/ЮМL25.2Т ng/ЮМL8410У NEB Smarter Buffer10У1У10MlyI10Т U/ЮМL0.6Т U/ЮМL6Total Volume100b.Incubate the mixture at 37ТАC overnight, deactivate at 80ТАC for 20Т min, and store at 4ТАC.5.Prepare final duplex MIP pool.a.Purify digested DNA by MinElute column.b.Pool elution samples into one tube.c.Measure concentration using by Qubit dsDNA HS (High Sensitivity) assay kit according to the manufacturer's protocol.6.Perform quality control on digested product size distribution. Run digested and undigested samples (Step 4b) on Tape Station (Agilent). The final duplex MIP pool should be тМ105Т bp, and undigested sample from step (4b) should be тМ150Т bp. (Figure1).FigureТ 1Duplex MIPs quality control7.Based on length of 105Т bp and the concentration, the final duplex MIPs pool is diluted to 80Т nM (80 fmol/ЮМL) stock solution, equivalent to 5.8Т ng/ЮМL. Dilute further to 8Т nM as working solution. Store both stock and working solutions at т20ТАC.

steps.title: Whole-genome-amplified genomic DNA preparation
steps.instruction: Single-cell WGA DNA is prepared by selected kit in advance. Here we just describe thawing of the single cell WGA DNA for the following step.8.Clean the bench with 70% Ethanol. Take out a plate of whole genome amplified genomic DNA from т20 freezer.9.Thaw at room temperature.10.Shake on a bench top mixer, quickly spin down (approximately 30 s) at 500Т rpm.CRITICAL: Keep the plate well sealed to avoid cross contamination.

steps.title: are amplified with a pair of...
steps.instruction: are amplified with a pair of unique barcoding primers for each sample in a reaction as shown below.ReagentsStock conc.Final conc.1У (ЮМl)TemplateNANA2dual-index Illumina primers5 pmol/ЮМL each0.5 pmol/ЮМL each2NEBNext Ultra II Q5 Master Mix2У1У10SYBR 100У10У0.5У1ddH2O5Total Volume20Barcoding PCR programTemperatureTimeCycles98ТАC30 s98ТАC10 sУ5 cycle56ТАC30 s65ТАC45 s98ТАC10 sУ15 cycle65ТАC75 s65ТАC5Т min4ТАCHold5.Sample pooling and Purification for Diagnostic Sequencinga.Clean up barcoded PCR product in a 96-well plate using 0.8У AMPure XP SPRI magnetic beads (Beckman Coulter) according to manufactoryтs manual by Tecan liquid handling system, eluted in 40Т ЮМL ddH2O.b.Pool equal volumes (usually take 2 ul) of purified samples manually.c.Concentrate the pool by MinElute according to manufacturer instructions, elute with 35Т ЮМL ddH2O.6.Size Selection for Diagnostic Sequencinga.Retain 3 ul of the concentrated pool for quality control in step 5.b.Run 30Т ЮМL of the concentrated pool on a lonza 2% V1 cassette BluePippin (Sage Science) with setting range 240т340Т bp according to manufactoryтs protocol. Agarose gel extraction in the range of 240т340Т bp can serve as an alternative.c.Purify size-selected elution by MinElute, elute with 15Т ЮМL ddH2O.d.Measure concentration by Qubit dsDNA HS (High Sensitivity) assay kit. Troubleshooting 1e.Inspect size distribution of the concentrated pool before and after size selection using a Tape Station dsDNA chip (Figure 2 is a reuse of panel 1 in Supplementary Figure 1 from our Cell Reports Methods paper (Tao etТ al.,

steps.title: and confirms a single peak around 300Т bp
steps.instruction: and confirms a single peak around 300Т bp. Troubleshooting 2FigureТ 2Quality control of sequencing libraryf.Dilute size-selected pool to make 12Т ЮМL of 4Т nM (4 fmol/ЮМL) library for Illumina NGS calculated based on the concentration and average size reported by the Tape Station.7.Diagnostic sequencing (тМ17Т h for sequencing, тМ2Т h for analysis) Troubleshooting 5a.Sequence at 10 pM loading concentration. We recommend to run on a 300 cycle MiSeq Nano flow cell in pair end mode. Set Read1 and Read2 as 151, and both Index1 and Index2 reads as

steps.title: Minimum read length we have tested...
steps.instruction: Minimum read length we have tested is 125 У 2 pair end to allow sequencing through the repeat regions of most STRs in our design. Default sequencing primers suffice for sequencing.b.Following bcl2fastq demultiplexing, merge overlapping Read1 and Read2 with the following command:Т >pear -v 40 -m 300 -f fastq1 -r fastq2 -opear_files_prefixc.Map merged reads against customized STR reference (as shown in Figure

steps.title: of all amplicons with bowtie2, each...
steps.instruction: of all amplicons with bowtie2, each appearing multiple times, once with every possible STR length.Т >bowtie2 -x index_files_prefix -U merged_fastq |samtools view -bS - | samtools sort -osorted_assignment_bamFigureТ 3MS reads mappingEach read is mapped to a specific target locus according to its flanking regions.d.For more details, parallel execution and integration to the clineage analysis system, pleaseТ seeТ the codes at: https://github.com/shapirolab/clineage/blob/master/sequencing/analysis/full_msv/full_msv.pye.Extract the total number of reads per sample from тsorted_assignment_bamт with pysam.8.Balancing reads per samplea.Calculate the scaling volume for each sample based on the total number of reads extracted from the diagnostic sequencing result to equalize the read coverage per sample. For example, sample A got 500 reads, sample B got 1000 reads in the diagnostic sequencing, to equalize the read coverage in the following production sequencing, we can pool 2 ul sample A with 1 ul sample B.b.According to the scaling volume, pool purified samples from step (5a) manually or by Echo550, then concentrate by miniElute, elute in 35ЮМL ddH2O.c.Prepare production sequencing library for pooled samples as in step (6).9.Production sequencing (тМ29Т h for sequencing)

steps.title: Library preparation and sequencing
steps.instruction: The minimum reads per samples is 1M, and the minimum read length is 125 У 2 pair end. We recommend to sequence up to 200 samples on one NextSeq500 high output flow cell with 151У2 pair-end run parameters according to manufactory manual and relying on default sequencing primers. Set both Index1 and Index2 as 8. Load at 1.8т2.2 pM concentration. (FigureТ 3)Optional: If the production sequencing doesnтt generate enough reads for some samples (i.e over 1M reads for samples enriched with the OM6 panel), another round of NextSeq could be conducted using the same library for these samples. Consider Hiseq or NovaSeq platforms for large scale projects.

description: The protocol below describes the specific steps for using whole genome amplified genomic DNA (REPLI-g Mini Kit, Qiagen) from Du145 single cells for the 12K OM6 STR panel presented in our Cell Reports Methods paper (Tao etТ al., 2021) (Custom Array). However, we have also used this protocol for primary cells such as melanoma, leukemia, T-cells, Macrophages, etc. and other whole genome amplification kits such as REPLI-g Single Cell Kit, Ampli1WGA kit, MALBAC single cell WGA kit etc.
